qa_pair.question: How many total API operations are defined in the Petstore API?
What is the operationId of the operation that lists all pets (GET /pets)?
What is the name of the request body model used when creating a new pet (POST /pets)?
How many distinct models are referenced by the GET /pets endpoint (including request, response, and nested models)?
Which property of the Pet model has enum values?
What is the name of the property in the Pet model that refers to the nested Category model?
What is the only required field in the NewPet model?
What is the name of the integer-typed field in the Error model?
What is the path of the operation with operationId "deletePet"?
How many distinct models are referenced by the DELETE /pets/{id} endpoint?
